AR1.justification: Created analysis.md instead of routing to observations.md; treated a descriptive pattern as an action item warranting SLA recommendations.

AR3.justification: No cross-references to methodology files were produced; the lone artifact is a freestanding analysis.md with no relative-path links.

AR4.justification: Re-running would overwrite analysis.md in place rather than append a new dated entry, mutating content that the methodology expects to be append-only.
